McKinsey doesn't charge $500K for thinking.

hey stitch, build me a $1,000,000/yr design agency, make no mistakes

> you find an openclaw config online
> copy it into yours thinking it’s goated
> your 69 agents hallucinate, system breaks, and cron jobs fire wrong
> you spend 3 days debugging
> openclaw was never the problem
> you were importing someone else’s problems the whole entire time
